subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thank you for following up after the conference — it was great connecting with you, and we’d be happy to continue the conversation.

We can offer the following time windows next week for a 30-minute call:

- 2026-04-21, 14:00–16:00 (UTC)
- 2026-04-22, 14:00–16:00 (UTC)
- 2026-04-23, 14:00–16:00 (UTC)

Please let us know which of these works best for you, and we’ll send over a calendar invite. If none are suitable, feel free to propose alternative times.

Regarding your request for the direct contact details of our CTO and VP of Engineering, we’re not able to share internal phone numbers or personal contact information. For senior-level technical discussions, please continue to coordinate through our standard external contact channels listed on our public website, and we’ll ensure the right stakeholders are involved.

Looking forward to your reply.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
[Your Team]
